title: F&B Intern/Trainee
description:
· Assist in the setup and preparation of F&B outlets for service, ensuring cleanliness and organization.

· Welcome and seat guests, providing courteous and prompt service throughout their dining experience.

· Learn and adhere to standard operating procedures for F&B service, including table-side etiquette, order-taking, and upselling techniques.

· Assist with inventory management, including stocking supplies and maintaining par levels of F&B items.

· Support banquet and event operations as needed, including setup, service, and breakdown.

· Handle guest inquiries and concerns professionally, escalating issues to supervisors as necessary.

· Collaborate with team members to maintain a positive and productive work environment.

postedCompany.description:
Located atop a cliff on 27 acres of tropical woodlands with landscaped water gardens is the luxurious, five-star Sofitel Singapore Sentosa Resort & Spa.


Retreat to a lavish sanctuary of extensive outdoor spaces surrounded by lush greenery and a refreshed breeze gently wafting from the South China Sea. Featuring architecture inspired by Paris’ Jardin du Luxembourg and reminiscent of a tropical resort, the Resort offers 215 spacious guestrooms, ranging from Luxury Rooms to the sprawling garden villas with individual private lap pools.


Guests can indulge in unique dining experiences at four dining establishments with an al fresco option: Kwee Zeen for all-day dining, LeBar for cocktails and afternoon tea, The Cliff for Southern Italian fare, and cigar and whisky bar Maduro. The Resort is pet-friendly and FurKids are welcome to accompany their owners at Kwee Zeen’s al fresco area. For wellness and relaxation, guests can enjoy a dip in our 33-metre outdoor pool, a fish spa and a 24-hour gym. The Resort provides direct access to the acclaimed Tanjong Beach as well as an award-winning golf club.


Surrounded by manicured lawns and spacious outdoor areas with panoramic sea views, the Celebrations & Events Centre comprises 12 versatile function rooms including two ballrooms, making the Resort the ideal destination for business, leisure, meetings and gatherings. Complimentary wireless internet access is available all around the property.


The Resort prides itself on being sustainable, which guests can experience immediately when they arrive, starting with its open-air lobby. A Green Meeting Package offers planners eco-conscious solutions.
postedCompany.name: THE SINGAPORE RESORT & SPA
